occupation: Senior Client Manager at Evolve OOH
headline: International Client Manager
summary:
With over 5 years of experience in media planning, international campaign coordination, and client management, I specialize in delivering impactful, data-driven strategies across both traditional and digital channels.

Having spent the last 12 years in the UK, I’ve built my career in top-tier London media agencies, most recently as a Senior Client Manager at Talon Outdoor—leading multi-market Out-of-Home campaigns for brands like Apple, Range Rover, and British Airways.

Fluent in English and Italian, I bring an international mindset, analytical thinking, and a proactive approach to every project. I'm now planning my return to Italy, ready to bring global experience to a local context and continue growing in a dynamic, forward-thinking environment.

experiences.title: International Client Manager
experiences.description: • Working alongside international brands to deliver OOH multi-market strategic and tactical planning processes across 12 markets. • Collaborating with internal teams to develop best-in-class campaigns and innovations aligned with the global strategy and consideration of regional market landscapes. •Locating possibilities for business expansion and development inside current foreign client accounts, cross-selling or upselling goods or services, and investigating fresh forms of cooperation. • Conducting market research and analysis to spot trends and growth opportunities in global markets while delivering regular reports on key performance metrics, examining data to spot areas for improvement, and formulating strategic recommendations to improve the process.

experiences.title: Client Manager
experiences.description: Working closely with multiple clients managing their consumer sampling/email campaigns. Liaising with the operations team to ensure that the targets are met and campaigns are run efficiently.

experiences.title: Operations Assistant
experiences.description: ⬝ Managing campaigns. ⬝ Providing excellent customer service and maintaining relationships with receiving companies. ⬝ Preparing post-campaign reports.

experiences.title: Sales Marketing Assistant
experiences.description: ⬝ Growing The Work Perk client base in the UK & Internationally. ⬝ Building and sustaining relationships with brand stakeholders. ⬝ Helping Brands in the creation of a higher-level brand engagement, by getting a social audience to engage with and talk about their products.

experiences.title: Network Account Manager
experiences.description: ⬝ Driving awareness of our company strategy ⬝ Promoting how employee benefits can boost morale in the workplace ⬝ Building and sustaining relationships with Human Resources and Employee Benefits Managers

experiences.title: Team member
experiences.description: Working for events in major 5 stars hotels in London.

experiences.title: Social Media Marketing Specialist
experiences.description: Internship as Social Media Specialist. •	Creativity: creating monthly editorial plans, fro all the different Social Media pages of clients •	Organisation: keep track of several accounts of different platforms for various clients •	Planning: communicating with the client to ensure the content created satisfies the requirements of the client, create a different social marketing plan based on the different types of promotion needed •	Data Analysis: giving monthly reports to clients regarding the performance of their platforms

experiences.company: Chiquito Restaurant, Bar and Mexican Grill
experiences.title: Hostess
Social Media Research Executive
experiences.description: Internship as Social Media Research Executive. •	Self-motivation: commit to a job in which I had to be reachable at any time •	Time management: guarantee that all the deadlines for the different projects are met in time •	Creativity: developing new promotion ideas for new clients •	Organisation: keeping track of all the platforms the agency was adopting
